creator: Karli.Sjoberg@slu.se
text:
Created attachment 180357
sssd-freebsd.tar.gz

Hi!

I would like to standardize on sssd for my AD authentication, but I can´t get it working in a virtual FreeBSD 10.3 machine. Have set up two other virtual machines, one running Ubuntu 16.04 and the other CentOS 7, and configured them as identical as possible. With Ubuntu and CentOS the authentication works and I am able to login on local prompt and over SSH, but with FreeBSD neither works.

The versions differ slightly, wondering if that might be the issue:
FreeBSD: 1.11.7
Ubuntu:  1.13.4
CentOS:  1.14.0

I have attached a tarball of all the (scrubbed) configuration files. Have anyone ever gotten sssd working towards AD in FreeBSD at all?

Best Regards
Karli Sjöberg
